insight: For exchange-web trading-only scope, route gating alone is insufficient because wallet/layout/trade components import Earn, Convert, verification, referral, and profile security code. Plan should remove navigation, gate direct routes, and then clean shared imports/services.
For the exchange-web trading-only phase, user explicitly decided: no registration, no reset-password, no withdrawal; keep both spot and futures.

When testing audex with docker rust:1.85-bookworm, set PATH=/usr/local/cargo/bin:$PATH and install python3-pip clang libclang-dev default-jdk-headless libbsd-dev pkg-config protobuf-compiler libprotobuf-dev, then install cmake via pip because Debian cmake is too old.

Position liquidation settlement retries are unsafe unless Balance ApplyDelta treats reference_id as an idempotency key; current Balance stores reference_id for audit but does not dedupe before mutation.
Admin market source and reconcile_status are exposed to grpc clients through MarketConfigV2.metadata, not first-class proto fields; finex-web should map metadata before considering proto churn.

When validating Audex without Exchange Web, keep MarketData and investor UI out of phase 1; use finex-web/FinexService for runtime and orderbook inspection while Gateway remains the order-entry boundary.

For Audex finex-web Keycloak integration, Keycloak owns identity/role assignment, an OIDC verification boundary validates JWKS and injects trusted x-finex-* metadata, and FinexService keeps method-level role checks while production disables Bearer role:actor fallback.

Gateway currently creates one Aeron SyncClientHandle at startup and treats NotConnected as a hard offer failure; Kafka-like recovery needs publication self-healing plus durable order intent/outbox and persistent Finex idempotency across market recreation.

Finex-web orderbook should bootstrap via Finex snapshot but live-update from Gateway public depth.<symbol> WebSocket; current 100ms snapshot polling is the wrong architecture and Gateway already has a depth channel bridge via Aeron->Redis->WsHub that must be verified first.

For Audex orderbook streaming, implement a backend depth verifier first: Finex Aeron depth -> Gateway Redis marketdata:depth -> Gateway WS depth.<symbol>. UI WebSocket work is not sufficient until that chain emits under an order mutation.

Finex-web orderbook should seed OrderBookStore with the page or reactivation snapshot before treating depth.diff frames as contiguous increments; diff can arrive before first snapshot and should wait rather than emit a sequence-gap toast. Toast context value should stay memoized so showing a toast does not recreate Gateway WS subscriptions.
Local kline OHLC cannot reliably match Binance around minute boundaries unless replayed local TradeEvents carry Binance source trade/kline timestamps instead of Finex matcher batch SystemTime::now().

User explicitly wants future multi-Gateway scale, so orderbook latency plans should not remove the shared Redis/pubsub or equivalent cross-Gateway fanout path; optimize it instead of bypassing it for direct in-process WS only.
